# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

services:
  - name: users-service
    url: users-service.com:8080

  - name: products-service
    url: products-service.com:8080

routes:
  - name: users-route
    paths:
      - /users
    service: users-service

  - name: products-route
    paths:
      - /products
    service: products-service

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      limit: 100
      window_size: 60s

  - name: caching
    config:
      cache_size: 1000
      cache_ttl: 60s

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    targets:
      - users-service.com:8080

  - name: products-upstream
    targets:
      - products-service.com:8080

load_balancing:
  - name: round-robin
    targets:
      - users-upstream
      - products-upstream
